form.formComment: Seven-year-old entire showed improvement last start. 2nd (Fr1) over 2185m at Pinjarra, beaten 4 m by Ultimate Tess (2:43.80) in NR up to 70 on April 6 at $12. The race before was not as impressive when well beaten into fifth behind Mriya Dream at Pinjarra over 1684m in a NR up to 70 on March 30 at $31. Prefer others on this occasion.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 11th (Fr7) over 2185m after showing early speed and racing wide at Pinjarra, beaten 40 m by Ultimate Tess (2:43.80) in NR up to 70 on April 6 at $4.80.
